name: AjoAI
description: Autonomous rotating-savings (ajo/esusu/chama/stokvel) agent on Celo. Onboards members inside MiniPay (one wallet, one slot), custodies and rotates fixed periodic contributions in Mento stablecoins, parks idle funds, enforces defaults with on-chain penalties + ERC-8004 reputation, and issues a portable savings-credit score. Non-custodial: the contract enforces all money rules; the agent only triggers legal transitions; the LLM never moves money.

skills.name: Create circle
skills.description: Deploy a savings circle with fixed contribution, period, and rotation.

skills.name: Collect contributions
skills.description: Pull each member's periodic contribution in a Mento stablecoin.

skills.name: Autonomous payout
skills.description: Pay the full pot to the round's recipient on schedule, no human in the loop.

skills.name: Default recovery
skills.description: Cover missed rounds from security deposits; write negative ERC-8004 reputation.

skills.name: Savings-credit score
skills.description: Issue a portable ERC-8004 savings-credit score per member.

skills.name: Natural-language member Q&A
skills.description: Answer member questions in English, Nigerian Pidgin, and Swahili (explains chain state; never authorizes money).

framework: custom (Python web3.py); LLM = DeepSeek (NL handler only, never moves money)
